subtitle: Build a contract generation system with customizable templates, variable substitution, e-signature, and PDF export
boss_tip: Start with one contract type (employment agreement) and get the template engine + PDF export working. Adding more templates is just content after the engine works.
prompt_body:
你是一位专业的全栈开发工程师，精通马来西亚商业法律文件处理。请为马来西亚中小企业（SME）构建一套完整的「合同与协议生成系统」。

## 项目背景

公司名称：{{company_name}}
公司地址：{{company_address}}
支持的合同类型：{{contract_types}}
默认通知期：{{default_notice_period}}

该系统替代传统在 Word 文档中手动起草合同的工作流程，支持雇佣合同、服务协议、保密协议、租赁合同、供应商合同等多种模板，并内置马来西亚雇佣法（Employment Act 1955）相关条款。

## 技术栈要求

- 前端框架：Next.js 14（App Router）+ TypeScript
- UI 组件库：Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui（new-york 风格，浅色模式）
- 数据库：Supabase（PostgreSQL + RLS + 实时订阅）
- PDF 生成：react-pdf 或 @react-pdf/renderer
- 签名功能：react-signature-canvas
- 模板引擎：Handlebars.js（处理 {{变量}} 占位符）
- 文件存储：Supabase Storage（存放生成的 PDF）
- 部署：Vercel

## 数据库架构

请创建以下完整的 Supabase PostgreSQL 表结构：

**contract_templates 表**
- id（uuid，主键）
- name（text，模板名称，例：「雇佣合同标准版」）
- type（text，枚举：employment / service / nda / tenancy / supplier）
- body（text，包含 Handlebars 占位符的合同正文）
- clauses（jsonb，已选条款 ID 列表）
- version（integer，版本号）
- is_active（boolean）
- created_by（uuid，外键 auth.users）
- created_at / updated_at（timestamptz）
- 索引：type 列、is_active 列

**contracts 表**
- id（uuid，主键）
- template_id（uuid，外键 contract_templates）
- title（text，合同标题）
- variables_data（jsonb，填入的变量键值对）
- status（text，枚举：draft / sent / signed / active / expired / terminated）
- generated_pdf_url（text，Supabase Storage URL）
- sent_at / signed_at / expires_at（timestamptz）
- counterparty_name / counterparty_email（text）
- notes（text）
- created_by（uuid，外键 auth.users）
- created_at / updated_at（timestamptz）
- 索引：template_id、status、expires_at、created_by

**contract_variables 表**
- id（uuid，主键）
- template_id（uuid，外键 contract_templates）
- key（text，变量键名，例：employee_name）
- label_zh（text，中文标签）
- label_en（text，英文标签）
- input_type（text，枚举：text / textarea / date / number / select）
- default_value（text）
- options（jsonb，select 类型的选项列表）
- is_required（boolean）
- sort_order（integer）
- 索引：template_id 列

**signatures 表**
- id（uuid，主键）
- contract_id（uuid，外键 contracts）
- signer_name（text）
- signer_email（text）
- signer_role（text，例：employer / employee）
- signature_image（text，Base64 签名图像）
- signed_at（timestamptz）
- ip_address（text）
- created_at（timestamptz）
- 索引：contract_id 列

**clause_library 表**
- id（uuid，主键）
- category（text，枚举：employment / service / nda / tenancy / general）
- title_zh / title_en（text，条款标题）
- body（text，条款正文，可含占位符）
- is_mandatory（boolean，是否为强制条款）
- legal_reference（text，法律依据，例：「就业法令第 12 条」）
- created_at（timestamptz）

**template_versions 表**
- id（uuid，主键）
- template_id（uuid，外键 contract_templates）
- version（integer）
- body_snapshot（text）
- changed_by（uuid）
- changed_at（timestamptz）

## 核心功能模块

### 1. 模板管理器
创建 /admin/contracts/templates 页面：
- 模板列表（表格视图，显示名称、类型、版本、合同数量）
- 模板编辑器：左侧富文本编辑区（支持 {{变量名}} 占位符高亮），右侧变量管理面板
- 条款库侧边栏：可拖拽插入预设法律条款
- 版本历史：查看并恢复历史版本
- 变量定义：为每个占位符配置标签、类型、默认值

### 2. 合同生成表单
创建 /contracts/new 页面，实现分栏布局：
- 左侧：根据所选模板动态渲染表单字段
  - 顶部模板选择器（雇佣合同 / 服务协议 / 保密协议 / 租赁合同 / 供应商合同）
  - 表单字段根据 contract_variables 表动态生成
  - 必填字段验证（react-hook-form + Zod）
- 右侧：实时合同预览
  - 公司信函抬头（公司名称、地址、LOGO 占位）
  - 变量实时替换后的格式化合同正文
  - 条款编号与层级排版
  - 签名区域预览

### 3. PDF 生成与导出
- 使用 @react-pdf/renderer 生成专业 PDF
- PDF 样式：A4 纸张，Times New Roman / Noto Serif CJK 字体，页眉含公司名称，页脚含页码与生成日期
- 将生成的 PDF 上传至 Supabase Storage，保存 URL 至 contracts 表
- 提供「下载 PDF」按钮（立即下载）

### 4. 电子签名模块
创建 /contracts/[id]/sign 签名页面：
- 显示完整合同内容（只读）
- 底部签名画板（react-signature-canvas，支持鼠标/触控笔）
- 「清除」与「确认签名」按钮
- 签名后将图像存入 signatures 表，更新 contracts.status 为 signed
- 生成含签名的最终 PDF 并覆盖存储

### 5. 合同状态追踪
状态流转：Draft（草稿）→ Sent（已发送）→ Signed（已签署）→ Active（生效中）→ Expired（已到期）
- 每次状态变更记录时间戳
- 到期提醒：expires_at 前 30 天触发提醒标记

### 6. 批量生成功能
创建 /contracts/bulk 页面：
- 上传 CSV 文件，首行为变量键名，后续行为各份合同的变量值
- 解析 CSV，批量调用合同生成逻辑
- 显示批量生成进度条
- 完成后提供打包下载（ZIP 压缩多份 PDF）

## 马来西亚法律内容要求

雇佣合同模板必须包含以下条款（参照马来西亚就业法令 Employment Act 1955）：
- 雇员公积金（EPF / KWSP）：雇主缴纳 13%，雇员缴纳 11%
- 社险（SOCSO / PERKESO）：按月薪上限 RM 5,000 计算
- 就业保险（EIS）：雇主与雇员各缴纳 0.4%
- 年假权益：工作满 1 年 8 天，2 年 12 天，5 年以上 16 天
- 病假：工作满 1 年 14 天，2 年 18 天，5 年以上 22 天
- 通知期：{{default_notice_period}}（试用期可为 1 个月）
- 公共假期：每年 11 天法定公假
- 加班规定：平日超时 1.5 倍，休息日 2 倍，公假 3 倍

## 仪表盘统计页面

创建 /contracts 主页面，显示：
- 统计卡片：本月新增合同数、待签署数量、即将到期（30 天内）、已生效合同总数
- 合同状态分布（横向进度条或小型饼图）
- 合同列表（可按状态、类型、日期筛选，支持搜索对方当事人姓名）
- 模板使用次数排行
- 即将到期合同提醒列表

## UI 设计规范

- 导航栏：深色底（#0F172A）+ 白色文字 + 黄色（#FCD34D）强调色
- 合同预览区：白色背景，模拟 A4 纸张阴影效果，衬线字体
- 状态标签：使用 shadcn/ui Badge 组件（draft 灰色 / sent 蓝色 / signed 绿色 / expired 红色）
- 表单布局：两栏分屏，左侧表单宽度 40%，右侧预览 60%
- 响应式：移动端折叠为单列，预览置于表单下方
- 使用 cn() 工具函数处理所有条件类名

请生成完整的项目代码，包括所有页面、组件、API 路由、Supabase 迁移 SQL 和 RLS 策略。确保代码可直接运行，无占位符注释。
prompt_body_en:
You are an expert full-stack engineer with deep knowledge of Malaysian business law document workflows. Build a complete Contract & Agreement Generator system for Malaysian SMEs.

## Project Context

Company Name: {{company_name}}
Company Address: {{company_address}}
Supported Contract Types: {{contract_types}}
Default Notice Period: {{default_notice_period}}

This system replaces the manual process of drafting contracts in Word documents. It supports employment agreements, service agreements, NDAs, tenancy agreements, and supplier contracts — all with Malaysian Employment Act 1955 compliance built in.

## Tech Stack

- Framework: Next.js 14 (App Router) + TypeScript (strict mode)
- UI: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui (new-york style, light mode, slate base color)
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL + RLS + Realtime)
- PDF Generation: @react-pdf/renderer
- Signature Capture: react-signature-canvas
- Template Engine: Handlebars.js (for {{variable}} placeholder substitution)
- File Storage: Supabase Storage (for generated PDFs)
- Form Validation: react-hook-form + Zod
- Deployment: Vercel

## Database Schema

Create the following complete Supabase PostgreSQL tables with all columns, indexes, and RLS policies:

**contract_templates**
- id (uuid, primary key, gen_random_uuid())
- name (text, not null) — e.g. "Standard Employment Agreement"
- type (text, not null) — enum: employment / service / nda / tenancy / supplier
- body (text, not null) — Handlebars template with {{variable}} placeholders
- clauses (jsonb, default '[]') — array of selected clause IDs
- version (integer, default 1)
- is_active (boolean, default true)
- created_by (uuid, references auth.users)
- created_at / updated_at (timestamptz, default now())
- Indexes: CREATE INDEX ON contract_templates(type), CREATE INDEX ON contract_templates(is_active)

**contracts**
- id (uuid, primary key)
- template_id (uuid, references contract_templates, not null)
- title (text, not null)
- variables_data (jsonb, not null) — key-value pairs of filled variables
- status (text, default 'draft') — enum: draft / sent / signed / active / expired / terminated
- generated_pdf_url (text) — Supabase Storage public URL
- sent_at / signed_at / expires_at (timestamptz)
- counterparty_name (text)
- counterparty_email (text)
- notes (text)
- created_by (uuid, references auth.users)
- created_at / updated_at (timestamptz)
- Indexes: CREATE INDEX ON contracts(template_id), contracts(status), contracts(expires_at), contracts(created_by)

**contract_variables**
- id (uuid, primary key)
- template_id (uuid, references contract_templates, on delete cascade)
- key (text, not null) — variable key used in Handlebars template, e.g. employee_name
- label_zh (text) — Chinese label shown in form
- label_en (text) — English label shown in form
- input_type (text) — enum: text / textarea / date / number / select
- default_value (text)
- options (jsonb) — array of strings for select input type
- is_required (boolean, default true)
- sort_order (integer, default 0)
- Index: CREATE INDEX ON contract_variables(template_id)

**signatures**
- id (uuid, primary key)
- contract_id (uuid, references contracts, on delete cascade)
- signer_name (text, not null)
- signer_email (text)
- signer_role (text) — e.g. employer / employee / witness
- signature_image (text) — Base64 PNG data URL of drawn signature
- signed_at (timestamptz, default now())
- ip_address (text)
- created_at (timestamptz)
- Index: CREATE INDEX ON signatures(contract_id)

**clause_library**
- id (uuid, primary key)
- category (text) — enum: employment / service / nda / tenancy / general
- title_zh (text) — Chinese clause title
- title_en (text) — English clause title
- body (text) — clause text, may include Handlebars placeholders
- is_mandatory (boolean, default false)
- legal_reference (text) — e.g. "Employment Act 1955, Section 12"
- sort_order (integer)
- created_at (timestamptz)

**template_versions**
- id (uuid, primary key)
- template_id (uuid, references contract_templates)
- version (integer)
- body_snapshot (text) — full template body at this version
- changed_by (uuid, references auth.users)
- changed_at (timestamptz, default now())
- Index: CREATE INDEX ON template_versions(template_id)

## RLS Policies

- contract_templates: SELECT for anon/authenticated where is_active = true; INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE for authenticated admin users only
- contracts: SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE for authenticated users matching created_by; anon can INSERT (for counterparty signing flow)
- signatures: INSERT for anon (counterparty signs via public link); SELECT for authenticated owner
- clause_library: SELECT for all; write for admin only
- Always wrap auth.uid() in (select auth.uid()) to prevent per-row evaluation

## Feature 1: Template Manager (/admin/contracts/templates)

Build a full template management interface:
- Template list page: table showing name, type, version, contract count, last updated, active status toggle
- Template editor: two-column layout
  - Left: textarea/rich editor for template body with {{variable}} syntax highlighting via regex replace
  - Right: variables panel — list all contract_variables for this template, add/edit/delete variables inline
- Clause library sidebar: drawer showing all clauses by category, click to insert at cursor position
- Version history panel: list all template_versions, click to preview diff, button to restore
- Auto-save: debounced 2s auto-save with visual indicator
- On save: insert row into template_versions before updating contract_templates

## Feature 2: Contract Generation Form (/contracts/new)

Split-view page (40% form / 60% live preview):
- Template selector at top: tabs or dropdown (Employment Agreement / Service Agreement / NDA / Tenancy Agreement / Supplier Contract)
- On template select: fetch contract_variables from Supabase, render dynamic form fields
- Form fields: text, textarea, date picker (shadcn/ui Popover + Calendar), number with RM prefix, select dropdown
- Validation: Zod schema generated dynamically from variable definitions
- Live preview (right panel): Handlebars.compile(template.body)(formValues) rendered as formatted HTML
  - Company letterhead: company name, address, registration number, date
  - Clause numbering: 1.0, 1.1, 1.2 hierarchy
  - Variables highlighted in yellow until all fields filled
  - Simulated A4 paper shadow effect
- Save as draft: POST to /api/v1/contracts — inserts row with status='draft'
- Generate PDF button: calls PDF generation server action, uploads to Supabase Storage

## Feature 3: PDF Generation

Create a Server Action generateContractPdf(contractId: string):
- Fetch contract + template + variables_data from Supabase
- Compile Handlebars template with variables_data
- Use @react-pdf/renderer to create PDF document:
  - Page size: A4, margins: 2.54cm all sides
  - Fonts: register Noto Serif for Latin and CJK characters
  - Header: company name (bold, 14pt), address (10pt), horizontal rule
  - Body: clause text (11pt, 1.5 line spacing), clause numbers bold
  - Footer: page number, generation date, "Generated by {{company_name}}"
  - Signature section: two columns with printed name lines and "Signature:" label
- Upload PDF buffer to Supabase Storage bucket 'contracts' with path: {created_by}/{contract_id}.pdf
- Update contracts.generated_pdf_url with public URL
- Return signed URL valid for 1 hour for immediate download

## Feature 4: E-Signature Flow (/contracts/[id]/sign)

Public signing page (no auth required for counterparty):
- Display full contract HTML (read-only, same rendering as preview)
- Signer info form: Full Name, Email, Role (Employer / Employee)
- Signature pad (react-signature-canvas): white background, black ink, 600x200px
  - "Clear" button to reset canvas
  - "Confirm Signature" button — disabled until canvas has content
- On submit:
  1. Convert canvas to Base64 PNG: signatureCanvas.toDataURL('image/png')
  2. Insert row into signatures table
  3. Update contracts.status to 'signed', set signed_at = now()
  4. Regenerate PDF with embedded signature image
  5. Show success screen with download link
- Admin can send signing link via copy-to-clipboard button on contract detail page

## Feature 5: Contract Status Tracking

Implement status state machine:
- Draft → Sent: admin clicks "Send for Signature" button, sets sent_at
- Sent → Signed: counterparty completes signature flow
- Signed → Active: admin confirms, sets effective date
- Active → Expired: automated via Supabase pg_cron or check on page load comparing expires_at
- Any → Terminated: admin action with termination reason note
- Display status badge (shadcn/ui Badge): draft=slate, sent=blue, signed=green, active=emerald, expired=red, terminated=zinc
- Add status change log in contracts.notes field as append-only JSON array

## Feature 6: Bulk Contract Generation (/contracts/bulk)

CSV upload workflow:
- Template selector, then CSV upload dropzone (react-dropzone)
- CSV format: first row = variable keys matching selected template, subsequent rows = values
- Parse CSV client-side (papaparse library)
- Preview table: show first 5 rows with column mapping
- "Generate All" button: loop through rows, call generateContractPdf for each
- Progress bar showing N of total completed
- On completion: trigger ZIP download (jszip library) bundling all PDFs
- Insert all contracts to database with status='draft' and bulk_batch_id for grouping

## Feature 7: Dashboard (/contracts)

Main contracts page with:
- Summary cards row: Total Active Contracts, Awaiting Signature, Expiring in 30 Days, Drafts
- Status distribution: horizontal stacked bar using Tailwind widths (no chart library needed)
- Contracts table: columns = Title, Type, Counterparty, Status, Expires, Created — sortable headers
- Filters: status select, type select, date range picker, search by counterparty name
- Expiring soon panel: list of contracts where expires_at < now() + 30 days, with days remaining badge
- Template usage stats: bar list showing template name + usage count, sorted descending

## Malaysian Legal Content Requirements

The Employment Agreement template MUST include these clauses referencing Malaysian law:
- EPF / KWSP: Employer contributes 13% (or 12% if salary > RM 5,000), Employee contributes 11%
- SOCSO / PERKESO: Both parties contribute per SOCSO contribution schedule, capped at RM 5,000/month
- EIS (Employment Insurance System): 0.4% each from employer and employee
- Annual Leave: 8 days (< 2 years service), 12 days (2–5 years), 16 days (> 5 years) per Employment Act 1955 s.60E
- Sick Leave: 14 days (< 2 years), 18 days (2–5 years), 22 days (> 5 years) per s.60F
- Notice Period: {{default_notice_period}} (may be replaced by salary-in-lieu)
- Public Holidays: 11 gazetted public holidays per year per s.60D
- Overtime: 1.5x for weekday overtime, 2x for rest day, 3x for public holidays per s.60A
- Include stamp duty note: "This agreement is subject to stamp duty under the Stamp Act 1949"
- Governing law clause: "This agreement shall be governed by the laws of Malaysia"

## UI/UX Specifications

- Top navigation: dark background (#0F172A), white text, yellow (#FCD34D) accent on active item and primary CTA buttons
- Contract preview panel: white background, box-shadow for A4 paper effect, serif font for contract body text
- Form panel: clean white card, labels above inputs, helper text below, error messages in red-500
- Use shadcn/ui components: Card, Button, Input, Textarea, Select, Badge, Dialog, Table, Tabs, Sheet, Skeleton, Separator, Tooltip
- Loading states: Skeleton placeholders for contract list, spinner on PDF generation button
- Mobile responsive: stack form above preview on screens < 768px, hide preview until "Preview" tab clicked
- Use cn() from lib/utils for all conditional className merging
- Empty states: illustrated placeholder with CTA when no contracts exist yet

Generate the complete project with all pages, components, API routes, Supabase migration SQL, RLS policies, and seed data for the clause library. All code must be production-ready with no placeholder comments or TODO items.
preview_prompt: Generate a single HTML page showing a contract generator system. Show a split view: left side has a form for generating an Employment Agreement with fields (Employee Name: 'Sarah Tan', Position: 'Marketing Manager', Salary: 'RM 6,500', Start Date, Probation Period: '3 months', Work Location: 'Petaling Jaya'). Right side shows a live contract preview with company letterhead, formatted legal text with the variables filled in, clauses for EPF, SOCSO, leave entitlement, termination notice. Include a template selector at top (Employment Agreement, Service Agreement, NDA, Tenancy Agreement) and action buttons (Download PDF, Send for Signature, Save Draft). Show a recent contracts list below. Top nav with 'Contract Generator'. Use dark nav + white content + yellow accents. Malaysian legal context: Employment Act references, RM currency, Sdn Bhd.

variables.default_value: 雇佣合同, 服务协议, 保密协议, 租赁合同, 供应商合同
variables.default_value_en: Employment Agreement, Service Agreement, NDA, Tenancy Agreement, Supplier Contract

title_zh: 电子邮件通讯与营销管理系统
subtitle: Build a complete email marketing system with drag-and-drop editor, subscriber management, and campaign analytics
boss_tip: Start with the subscriber list management and a simple email composer — you need contacts before you can send. Add the drag-and-drop visual editor and analytics after basic sending works.
prompt_body_en:
You are an expert full-stack developer specializing in email marketing tools for small and medium enterprises. Build a complete Email Newsletter Builder & Campaign Manager web application tailored for Malaysian SME owners who need a cost-effective alternative to Mailchimp or MailerLite. The system must handle subscriber management, visual email composition, campaign scheduling, delivery via Resend API, and detailed performance analytics — all compliant with Malaysia's PDPA.

## Tech Stack
- Framework: Next.js 14 (App Router) with TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui (new-york style, slate base)
- Database & Auth: Supabase (Postgres + Row Level Security)
- Email Delivery: Resend API (resend.com)
- File Handling: Papaparse for CSV import/export
- Rich Editor: Custom block-based builder (no heavy dependencies)
- Hosting: Vercel

## Database Schema
Create the following Supabase tables with full RLS policies:

### subscriber_lists
- id: uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid()
- name: text not null
- description: text
- created_at: timestamptz default now()
- owner_id: uuid references auth.users
- subscriber_count: integer default 0 (denormalized, updated by trigger)

### subscribers
- id: uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid()
- list_id: uuid references subscriber_lists(id) on delete cascade
- email: text not null
- name: text
- tags: text[] default '{}'
- status: text check (status in ('active','unsubscribed','bounced','complained')) default 'active'
- subscribed_at: timestamptz default now()
- unsubscribed_at: timestamptz
- double_opt_in_confirmed: boolean default false
- double_opt_in_sent_at: timestamptz
- metadata: jsonb default '{}'
- Create index: idx_subscribers_list_id on subscribers(list_id)
- Create index: idx_subscribers_email on subscribers(email)
- Create index: idx_subscribers_status on subscribers(status)
- Unique constraint: (list_id, email)

### email_templates
- id: uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid()
- name: text not null
- description: text
- blocks: jsonb not null default '[]' (array of block objects)
- thumbnail_url: text
- is_system: boolean default false
- created_at: timestamptz default now()
- owner_id: uuid references auth.users

### campaigns
- id: uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid()
- subject: text not null
- preview_text: text
- from_name: text not null
- from_email: text not null
- reply_to: text
- list_id: uuid references subscriber_lists(id)
- template_id: uuid references email_templates(id)
- body_html: text (rendered HTML at send time)
- body_blocks: jsonb (block editor state)
- status: text check (status in ('draft','scheduled','sending','sent','cancelled')) default 'draft'
- scheduled_at: timestamptz
- sent_at: timestamptz
- ab_test_enabled: boolean default false
- ab_subject_b: text
- ab_winner_criteria: text check (ab_winner_criteria in ('open_rate','click_rate'))
- created_at: timestamptz default now()
- owner_id: uuid references auth.users
- Create index: idx_campaigns_status on campaigns(status)
- Create index: idx_campaigns_scheduled_at on campaigns(scheduled_at)

### campaign_stats
- id: uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid()
- campaign_id: uuid references campaigns(id) on delete cascade unique
- total_sent: integer default 0
- total_delivered: integer default 0
- total_opens: integer default 0
- unique_opens: integer default 0
- total_clicks: integer default 0
- unique_clicks: integer default 0
- bounces: integer default 0
- unsubscribes: integer default 0
- complaints: integer default 0
- open_rate: numeric(5,2) generated always as (case when total_sent > 0 then round(unique_opens::numeric / total_sent * 100, 2) else 0 end) stored
- click_rate: numeric(5,2) generated always as (case when total_sent > 0 then round(unique_clicks::numeric / total_sent * 100, 2) else 0 end) stored
- updated_at: timestamptz default now()

### campaign_events
- id: uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid()
- campaign_id: uuid references campaigns(id) on delete cascade
- subscriber_id: uuid references subscribers(id) on delete set null
- event_type: text check (event_type in ('sent','delivered','open','click','bounce','unsubscribe','complaint'))
- link_url: text
- occurred_at: timestamptz default now()
- ip_address: text
- user_agent: text
- Create index: idx_campaign_events_campaign_id on campaign_events(campaign_id)
- Create index: idx_campaign_events_subscriber_id on campaign_events(subscriber_id)
- Create index: idx_campaign_events_event_type on campaign_events(event_type)

### campaign_links
- id: uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid()
- campaign_id: uuid references campaigns(id) on delete cascade
- original_url: text not null
- tracking_token: text not null unique default encode(gen_random_bytes(12), 'hex')
- click_count: integer default 0
- Create index: idx_campaign_links_token on campaign_links(tracking_token)

## Core Features to Build

### 1. Subscriber List Management
- CRUD for subscriber lists with per-list subscriber counts
- Add individual subscribers via form (email, name, tags)
- Bulk import via CSV upload using Papaparse (map columns: email, name, tags)
- Export list to CSV with all subscriber fields
- Filter subscribers by status (active, unsubscribed, bounced) and tags
- Tag management: add/remove tags from subscribers, bulk tag operations
- Subscriber detail page showing campaign history and engagement
- Double opt-in flow: send confirmation email via Resend, confirm via tokenized link

### 2. Block-Based Email Template Builder
- Block types: Header (logo + brand color), Hero (full-width image + heading + CTA), Text (rich paragraph), Image (centered or full-width), Button (CTA with custom label, URL, color), Two-Column (product grid with image, name, price in RM), Divider, Footer (social links, unsubscribe, company address)
- Left sidebar: block palette with drag-to-add
- Center canvas: rendered email preview (600px max-width, white background)
- Right sidebar: selected block properties (text, colors, image URL, link URL)
- Real-time HTML generation from blocks array
- Save as reusable template with name and thumbnail
- Mobile preview toggle (320px preview mode)
- Auto-inject unsubscribe link into every Footer block (PDPA mandatory)
- Auto-inject tracking pixel (1x1 transparent PNG) before closing body tag

### 3. Campaign Creation & Scheduling
- Multi-step campaign wizard: Settings → Design → Review → Schedule/Send
- Step 1 Settings: campaign name, from name, from email ({{company_name}} default), reply-to, subject line, preview text, select subscriber list
- Step 2 Design: choose saved template or build from scratch in block editor
- Step 3 Review: preview desktop/mobile, estimated recipients, spam score warning
- Step 4: Send now or schedule for specific date/time (Malaysia timezone UTC+8)
- A/B subject line test: enter Subject A and Subject B, split 20% of list for test, send winner to remaining 80% after 4 hours based on open rate or click rate
- Send test email to a specified address before sending to full list

### 4. Email Delivery via Resend
- Server Action: sendCampaign(campaignId) — fetch active subscribers, render HTML blocks to final HTML, wrap all links with tracking URLs (/api/track/click?token=...), inject tracking pixel (/api/track/open?cid=...&sid=...), batch send via Resend with rate limiting (100 emails per second max)
- Use Resend batch send endpoint for efficiency
- Store each send as campaign_event with type 'sent'
- Handle Resend webhooks: delivered, bounced, complained — update subscriber status and campaign_stats

### 5. Open & Click Tracking
- Open tracking: GET /api/track/open?cid=[campaignId]&sid=[subscriberId] — return 1x1 transparent GIF, insert campaign_event(open), increment campaign_stats.total_opens and unique_opens
- Click tracking: GET /api/track/click?token=[trackingToken]&sid=[subscriberId] — lookup campaign_links by token, insert campaign_event(click), increment click counts, redirect to original_url
- One-click unsubscribe: GET /api/unsubscribe?token=[token] — verify HMAC token, set subscriber status to 'unsubscribed', record unsubscribed_at, show confirmation page (no login required)
- List-Unsubscribe header on all outgoing emails (RFC 8058 compliance)

### 6. PDPA Compliance (Malaysia Personal Data Protection Act)
- Double opt-in option per list (configurable)
- Unsubscribe link mandatory in every email (auto-injected)
- Suppression list: permanently unsubscribed emails never receive mail again
- Data export: subscribers can request their data (admin exports on their behalf)
- Retention policy note in admin UI (recommend deleting inactive subscribers after 2 years)
- Privacy policy URL field in campaign settings
- Physical address or P.O. Box required in footer (CAN-SPAM/PDPA alignment)

### 7. Campaign Analytics Dashboard
- Summary cards: Total Subscribers, Total Campaigns Sent, Average Open Rate, Average Click Rate
- Campaign list table: subject, status, sent date, recipients, open rate %, click rate %, unsubscribes — sortable columns
- Per-campaign detail: open rate timeline chart (opens over 48 hours), top clicked links table, subscriber engagement breakdown (opened, clicked, unsubscribed, bounced)
- Subscriber growth chart: new subscribers per week for past 12 weeks
- Best send time recommendation: show heatmap of open rates by day of week and hour
- A/B test results: side-by-side comparison of Subject A vs Subject B performance

## UI/UX Design
- Top navigation: dark navy (#0F172A) with brand logo and nav links (Campaigns, Subscribers, Templates, Analytics)
- Campaigns list page: Table with status badges (Draft=slate, Scheduled=blue, Sent=green), quick action dropdown (Edit, Duplicate, View Stats, Delete)
- Block editor: three-panel layout — block palette left (160px), canvas center (fluid), properties panel right (280px)
- Subscriber management: data table with search, filter chips for status and tags, bulk action toolbar (tag, export, delete)
- Analytics: card grid at top, chart below using Recharts, campaign comparison table
- Empty states with clear CTA: 'Import your first subscribers' button on empty list
- Loading skeletons for all data-heavy tables and charts
- Toast notifications for send success, import complete, errors
- Responsive: desktop-first but usable on tablet for quick checks

## Variables
- Company/Brand Name: {{company_name}} (default: 时尚坊 / Fashion Hub)
- Sender Email: {{sender_email}} (default: hello@fashionhub.my)
- Max Subscribers: {{subscriber_limit}} (default: 5000)
- Email Provider: {{email_provider}} (default: Resend)

## Deliverables
Generate the complete application including all route files, Supabase schema SQL, Resend integration, tracking API routes, block editor component, and campaign analytics. Include .env.example with NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, RESEND_API_KEY, UNSUBSCRIBE_HMAC_SECRET. The system must be production-ready for a Malaysian SME sending up to {{subscriber_limit}} subscribers per campaign.
prompt_body:
你是一位专注于中小企业电子邮件营销工具的全栈开发专家。请为马来西亚中小企业主构建一套完整的「电子邮件通讯与营销管理系统」，作为 Mailchimp 或 MailerLite 的平价替代方案。系统需涵盖订阅者管理、视觉化邮件编辑、活动排程、通过 Resend API 发送邮件，以及详细的效果分析——全面符合马来西亚《个人资料保护法》（PDPA）。

## 技术栈
- 框架：Next.js 14（App Router）+ TypeScript
- 样式：Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui（new-york 风格，slate 基色）
- 数据库与身份验证：Supabase（Postgres + 行级安全策略）
- 邮件发送：Resend API（resend.com）
- 文件处理：Papaparse（CSV 导入/导出）
- 邮件编辑器：自定义积木式编辑器（无重型依赖）
- 部署：Vercel

## 数据库结构
在 Supabase 中创建以下数据表，并配置完整的行级安全策略（RLS）：

### subscriber_lists（订阅者列表）
- id：uuid 主键，默认 gen_random_uuid()
- name：text，不可为空
- description：text
- created_at：timestamptz，默认 now()
- owner_id：uuid，关联 auth.users
- subscriber_count：integer，默认 0（由触发器自动更新）

### subscribers（订阅者）
- id：uuid 主键，默认 gen_random_uuid()
- list_id：uuid，关联 subscriber_lists(id)，级联删除
- email：text，不可为空
- name：text
- tags：text[]，默认 '{}'
- status：text，枚举（'active'、'unsubscribed'、'bounced'、'complained'），默认 'active'
- subscribed_at：timestamptz，默认 now()
- unsubscribed_at：timestamptz
- double_opt_in_confirmed：boolean，默认 false
- double_opt_in_sent_at：timestamptz
- metadata：jsonb，默认 '{}'
- 索引：idx_subscribers_list_id、idx_subscribers_email、idx_subscribers_status
- 唯一约束：(list_id, email)

### email_templates（邮件模板）
- id：uuid 主键
- name：text，不可为空
- description：text
- blocks：jsonb，默认 '[]'（积木对象数组）
- thumbnail_url：text
- is_system：boolean，默认 false
- created_at：timestamptz
- owner_id：uuid，关联 auth.users

### campaigns（营销活动）
- id：uuid 主键
- subject：text，不可为空（邮件主题）
- preview_text：text（预览文字）
- from_name：text，不可为空
- from_email：text，不可为空
- reply_to：text
- list_id：uuid，关联 subscriber_lists(id)
- template_id：uuid，关联 email_templates(id)
- body_html：text（发送时渲染的最终 HTML）
- body_blocks：jsonb（积木编辑器状态）
- status：text，枚举（'draft'、'scheduled'、'sending'、'sent'、'cancelled'），默认 'draft'
- scheduled_at：timestamptz
- sent_at：timestamptz
- ab_test_enabled：boolean，默认 false
- ab_subject_b：text
- ab_winner_criteria：text，枚举（'open_rate'、'click_rate'）
- created_at：timestamptz
- owner_id：uuid，关联 auth.users
- 索引：idx_campaigns_status、idx_campaigns_scheduled_at

### campaign_stats（活动统计）
- id：uuid 主键
- campaign_id：uuid，关联 campaigns(id)，唯一
- total_sent：integer，默认 0
- total_delivered：integer，默认 0
- total_opens：integer，默认 0
- unique_opens：integer，默认 0
- total_clicks：integer，默认 0
- unique_clicks：integer，默认 0
- bounces：integer，默认 0
- unsubscribes：integer，默认 0
- complaints：integer，默认 0
- open_rate：numeric(5,2)，由 unique_opens/total_sent*100 自动计算（generated stored）
- click_rate：numeric(5,2)，由 unique_clicks/total_sent*100 自动计算（generated stored）
- updated_at：timestamptz

### campaign_events（活动事件）
- id：uuid 主键
- campaign_id：uuid，关联 campaigns(id)
- subscriber_id：uuid，关联 subscribers(id)
- event_type：text，枚举（'sent'、'delivered'、'open'、'click'、'bounce'、'unsubscribe'、'complaint'）
- link_url：text
- occurred_at：timestamptz
- ip_address：text
- user_agent：text
- 索引：idx_campaign_events_campaign_id、idx_campaign_events_subscriber_id、idx_campaign_events_event_type

### campaign_links（追踪链接）
- id：uuid 主键
- campaign_id：uuid，关联 campaigns(id)
- original_url：text，不可为空
- tracking_token：text，不可为空，唯一，默认 encode(gen_random_bytes(12), 'hex')
- click_count：integer，默认 0
- 索引：idx_campaign_links_token

## 核心功能

### 1. 订阅者列表管理
- 订阅者列表的增删改查，实时显示每个列表的订阅人数
- 单个添加订阅者（电邮、姓名、标签）
- 通过 CSV 批量导入（使用 Papaparse 映射字段：email、name、tags）
- 导出列表为 CSV，包含所有字段
- 按状态（active、unsubscribed、bounced）和标签筛选订阅者
- 标签管理：添加/移除标签，支持批量打标签操作
- 订阅者详情页：显示参与该活动的历史记录与互动情况
- 双重确认订阅（Double Opt-in）：通过 Resend 发送确认邮件，点击令牌化链接后正式激活

### 2. 积木式邮件模板编辑器
- 积木类型：顶部栏（Logo + 品牌色）、主视觉（全宽图片 + 标题 + 行动按钮）、文字段落、图片、按钮（自定义文案/链接/颜色）、双栏商品格（商品图、名称、价格 RM）、分隔线、页脚（社交链接、退订、公司地址）
- 左侧面板：积木选板，支持拖放添加
- 中间画布：邮件实时预览（最大宽度 600px，白色背景）
- 右侧面板：所选积木属性（文字、颜色、图片链接、跳转链接）
- 实时从 blocks 数组生成 HTML
- 保存为可复用模板（含名称和缩略图）
- 手机预览切换（320px 预览模式）
- 每个页脚积木自动注入退订链接（PDPA 强制要求）
- 发送前自动在邮件尾部注入追踪像素（1x1 透明 PNG）

### 3. 活动创建与排程
- 多步骤活动向导：设置 → 设计 → 审核 → 排程/发送
- 第一步「设置」：活动名称、发件人姓名（默认 {{company_name}}）、发件人电邮（默认 {{sender_email}}）、回复邮件地址、邮件主题、预览文字、选择订阅者列表
- 第二步「设计」：选择已保存模板，或使用积木编辑器从头创建
- 第三步「审核」：桌面端/手机端预览切换、预估收件人数、垃圾邮件评分警告
- 第四步：立即发送，或按马来西亚时区（UTC+8）指定日期和时间排程
- A/B 主题行测试：填写主题 A 和主题 B，以 20% 名单做测试，4 小时后按开启率或点击率将胜出版本发给剩余 80% 订阅者
- 发送测试邮件：正式发送前先发送到指定地址预览

### 4. 通过 Resend 发送邮件
- Server Action「sendCampaign(campaignId)」：获取所有「active」状态订阅者，将积木数组渲染为最终 HTML，将所有链接替换为追踪 URL（/api/track/click?token=...），在邮件底部注入追踪像素（/api/track/open?cid=...&sid=...），通过 Resend 批量发送（每秒最多 100 封，做速率限制）
- 使用 Resend 批量发送接口（batch endpoint）提升效率
- 每封发送记录一条 campaign_event（类型为 'sent'）
- 处理 Resend Webhook：delivered、bounced、complained — 更新订阅者状态及 campaign_stats

### 5. 开启与点击追踪
- 开启追踪：GET /api/track/open?cid=[campaignId]&sid=[subscriberId]——返回 1x1 透明 GIF，写入 campaign_event（open），更新 campaign_stats 的 total_opens 和 unique_opens
- 点击追踪：GET /api/track/click?token=[trackingToken]&sid=[subscriberId]——通过 token 查找 campaign_links，写入 campaign_event（click），累加点击数，重定向至原始 URL
- 一键退订：GET /api/unsubscribe?token=[token]——验证 HMAC 令牌，将订阅者状态改为 'unsubscribed'，记录 unsubscribed_at，显示确认页面（无需登录）
- 所有外发邮件附带 List-Unsubscribe 标头（符合 RFC 8058）

### 6. PDPA 合规（马来西亚《个人资料保护法》）
- 每个列表可选配置「双重确认订阅」选项
- 每封邮件必须含退订链接（自动注入，不可省略）
- 永久屏蔽名单：已退订邮件地址永远不再收到邮件
- 数据导出：订阅者可申请获取其个人资料（由管理员代为导出）
- 管理界面提示数据保留建议：非活跃订阅者建议 2 年后删除
- 活动设置中提供「隐私政策链接」字段
- 页脚积木必填公司实体地址或邮政信箱（符合 PDPA 及 CAN-SPAM 要求）

### 7. 活动分析仪表盘
- 概览卡片：总订阅人数、已发活动数量、平均开启率、平均点击率
- 活动列表表格：主题、状态、发送日期、收件人数、开启率%、点击率%、退订数——支持列排序
- 单个活动详情：开启率时间线图（发送后 48 小时内的开启曲线）、点击链接排行表、订阅者参与细分（已开启、已点击、已退订、已退信）
- 订阅者增长图：过去 12 周每周新增订阅者趋势
- 最佳发送时间建议：以「星期×小时」热力图展示各时段开启率
- A/B 测试结果：主题 A 与主题 B 的效果并排对比

## 界面与体验设计
- 顶部导航：深海军蓝（#0F172A）背景，品牌 Logo，导航链接（活动、订阅者、模板、分析）
- 活动列表页：数据表格，状态徽章（草稿=slate、已排程=蓝色、已发送=绿色），快捷操作下拉菜单（编辑、复制、查看统计、删除）
- 积木编辑器：三栏布局——左侧积木选板（160px）、中间画布（自适应宽度）、右侧属性面板（280px）
- 订阅者管理：带搜索的数据表格，状态和标签的筛选标签，批量操作工具栏（打标签、导出、删除）
- 分析页：顶部卡片组 + 下方 Recharts 图表 + 活动对比表格
- 空状态：清晰的行动引导，例如空列表显示「导入您的第一批订阅者」按钮
- 所有数据量大的表格和图表均显示加载骨架屏
- Toast 通知：发送成功、导入完成、操作失败
- 响应式设计：以桌面端为主，平板可用于快速查阅

## 变量配置
- 公司/品牌名称：{{company_name}}（默认值：{{company_name}}）
- 发件人电邮：{{sender_email}}（默认值：{{sender_email}}）
- 最大订阅者数：{{subscriber_limit}}（默认值：{{subscriber_limit}}）
- 邮件服务商：{{email_provider}}（默认值：{{email_provider}}）

## 交付要求
生成完整应用，包括所有路由文件、Supabase 数据库 SQL 脚本、Resend 集成代码、追踪 API 路由、积木编辑器组件及活动分析功能。同时提供 .env.example，包含以下变量：NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL、NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY、SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY、RESEND_API_KEY、UNSUBSCRIBE_HMAC_SECRET。系统须达到生产级别，支持马来西亚中小企业每次活动向最多 {{subscriber_limit}} 名订阅者发送邮件。

Include a right sidebar with block palette (Image, Text, Button, Divider, Products, Social). Show campaign settings above: Subject Line 'Hari Raya Sale - Up to 50% Off!', From Name 'Fashion Hub', Subscriber List '2,450 contacts', Schedule picker. Include a campaign list below showing recent campaigns with open rate %, click rate %, and sent count. Top nav with 'Email Marketing'. Use dark nav + white content + yellow accents.

title_zh: 保险报价与保单管理系统
subtitle: Build a complete insurance management system with quotation generation, policy tracking, renewal reminders, and commission calculation
boss_tip: Start with the client database and quotation generator — agents need to quote quickly. Add policy tracking and renewal reminders after the quotation flow is smooth.
prompt_body:
你是一位专业的全栈开发工程师，请帮我构建一套完整的「保险报价与保单管理系统」，专为马来西亚保险代理人设计，使用 Next.js 14（App Router）+ TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui + Supabase。

## 代理行信息

代理行名称：{{agency_name}}
保险类型：{{insurance_types}}
默认佣金率：{{commission_rate}}%
续保提醒天数：{{renewal_reminder_days}} 天前通知

---

## 一、技术栈要求

- **前端框架**：Next.js 14 App Router + TypeScript
- **样式**：Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui（new-york 风格）
- **数据库**：Supabase（PostgreSQL + RLS + 实时订阅）
- **认证**：Supabase Auth（邮箱密码登录，代理人专用）
- **PDF 生成**：@react-pdf/renderer 或 jsPDF 生成报价单与保单摘要
- **通知**：Supabase Edge Functions + cron 自动续保提醒
- **部署**：Vercel

---

## 二、数据库架构（PostgreSQL）

请在 Supabase 中创建以下所有表，包含完整字段、约束、索引及 RLS 策略：

### 1. clients（客户档案）
sql
create table clients (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  agent_id uuid references auth.users(id) not null,
  full_name text not null,
  ic_number text not null unique,
  date_of_birth date not null,
  age integer generated always as (date_part('year', age(date_of_birth))::integer) stored,
  gender text check (gender in ('male','female')),
  phone text not null,
  email text,
  address text,
  occupation text,
  smoker boolean default false,
  notes text,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on clients (agent_id);
create index on clients (ic_number);


### 2. vehicles（车辆档案，汽车保险专用）
sql
create table vehicles (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  client_id uuid references clients(id) on delete cascade,
  plate_number text not null,
  make text not null,
  model text not null,
  year integer not null,
  engine_cc integer,
  market_value numeric(12,2),
  ncd_percentage numeric(5,2) default 0,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on vehicles (client_id);


### 3. quotations（报价记录）
sql
create table quotations (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  agent_id uuid references auth.users(id) not null,
  client_id uuid references clients(id) on delete cascade,
  vehicle_id uuid references vehicles(id),
  insurance_type text not null check (insurance_type in ('motor','life','medical','fire','travel')),
  sum_insured numeric(12,2),
  details jsonb not null default '{}',
  insurer_quotes jsonb not null default '[]',
  selected_insurer text,
  selected_premium numeric(10,2),
  status text default 'draft' check (status in ('draft','sent','accepted','rejected','converted')),
  valid_until date,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on quotations (agent_id);
create index on quotations (client_id);
create index on quotations (status);


### 4. policies（保单记录）
sql
create table policies (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  agent_id uuid references auth.users(id) not null,
  client_id uuid references clients(id) on delete cascade,
  vehicle_id uuid references vehicles(id),
  quotation_id uuid references quotations(id),
  policy_number text not null unique,
  insurance_type text not null,
  insurer text not null,
  sum_insured numeric(12,2) not null,
  basic_premium numeric(10,2) not null,
  ncd_discount numeric(10,2) default 0,
  loading_amount numeric(10,2) default 0,
  stamp_duty numeric(8,2) default 10,
  sst_amount numeric(10,2) default 0,
  total_premium numeric(10,2) not null,
  start_date date not null,
  end_date date not null,
  ncd_percentage numeric(5,2) default 0,
  status text default 'active' check (status in ('quotation','application','active','renewal','lapsed','cancelled')),
  documents jsonb default '[]',
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on policies (agent_id);
create index on policies (client_id);
create index on policies (end_date);
create index on policies (status);


### 5. commission_records（佣金记录）
sql
create table commission_records (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  agent_id uuid references auth.users(id) not null,
  policy_id uuid references policies(id) on delete cascade,
  client_name text not null,
  insurance_type text not null,
  premium_amount numeric(10,2) not null,
  commission_rate numeric(5,2) not null,
  commission_amount numeric(10,2) not null,
  earned_date date not null,
  payment_status text default 'pending' check (payment_status in ('pending','paid','cancelled')),
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on commission_records (agent_id);
create index on commission_records (earned_date);


### 6. renewal_reminders（续保提醒）
sql
create table renewal_reminders (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  policy_id uuid references policies(id) on delete cascade,
  agent_id uuid references auth.users(id) not null,
  reminder_date date not null,
  days_before integer not null,
  channel text default 'email' check (channel in ('email','whatsapp','sms')),
  sent boolean default false,
  sent_at timestamptz,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on renewal_reminders (agent_id);
create index on renewal_reminders (reminder_date);
create index on renewal_reminders (sent);


### 7. claim_records（理赔记录）
sql
create table claim_records (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  policy_id uuid references policies(id) on delete cascade,
  client_id uuid references clients(id),
  claim_number text unique,
  incident_date date not null,
  claim_type text not null,
  claim_amount numeric(12,2),
  approved_amount numeric(12,2),
  status text default 'submitted' check (status in ('submitted','under_review','approved','rejected','paid')),
  description text,
  documents jsonb default '[]',
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on claim_records (policy_id);


---

## 三、核心功能模块

### 模块一：客户数据库
- 完整客户资料录入（姓名、IC 号码、出生日期、电话、邮箱、职业、是否吸烟）
- 客户搜索与筛选（按姓名、IC、电话快速查找）
- 客户档案页显示所有关联保单、报价、车辆及理赔记录
- 文件上传（IC 复印件、驾照、车辆转让书）存储至 Supabase Storage

### 模块二：汽车保险报价计算器
按马来西亚汽车保险 NCD 折扣表计算：

NCD 0% = 无折扣（第一年或出险后）
NCD 25% = 第二年无索赔
NCD 38.33% = 第三年无索赔
NCD 45% = 第四年无索赔
NCD 55% = 第五年及以上无索赔

保费计算公式：
1. 基本保费 = 根据车型及市场价值计算
2. NCD 折扣 = 基本保费 × NCD%
3. 附加费（Loading）= 按年龄、职业、索赔记录加成
4. 印花税（Stamp Duty）= 固定 RM 10
5. 服务税（SST）= （基本保费 - NCD + Loading）× 8%
6. 应付总额 = 基本保费 - NCD + Loading + 印花税 + SST

同时对比至少三家保险公司报价（如 Allianz、AIA、Zurich），以表格形式并排显示。

### 模块三：多险种报价
除汽车险外，支持以下险种报价向导：
- **人寿保险**：按年龄、性别、保额、保期、吸烟状态计算保费
- **医疗保险**：按年龄、计划级别（基础/中级/高级）、附加骑手计算
- **火险**：按房屋面积、建筑类型、地点计算
- **旅游保险**：按目的地、行程天数、人数、保障范围计算

### 模块四：保单生命周期管理
状态流转：报价中 → 申请中 → 生效中 → 待续保 → 失效
- 保单列表视图（表格）和卡片视图可切换
- 按状态、险种、到期日筛选
- 一键复制续保（预填上期保单资料）
- 保单详情页显示完整保障信息及文件

### 模块五：续保提醒系统
- 系统在保单到期前 {{renewal_reminder_days}} 天自动生成提醒记录
- 仪表板「即将续保」列表，按到期日排序，显示剩余天数角标
- 逾期（已过期未续保）保单标红警示
- 支持通过 WhatsApp / 邮件手动发送续保通知模板

### 模块六：佣金追踪
- 每笔成交保单自动生成佣金记录（保费 × {{commission_rate}}%）
- 佣金分级设置：不同险种可设不同佣金率
- 月度佣金报告：本月成交件数、总保费、总佣金、已收/待收
- 佣金日历视图：按日期显示每日佣金收入

### 模块七：理赔管理
- 为客户登记理赔申请，关联对应保单
- 追踪理赔状态至结案
- 理赔记录影响该客户下次续保的 NCD 百分比

### 模块八：PDF 文件生成
- 报价单 PDF：公司抬头、客户信息、保障详情、保费明细、有效期
- 保单摘要 PDF：保单号、保障范围、受益人、重要联系方式
- 续保通知书 PDF：到期提醒、新保费预估、联系代理人方式

---

## 四、界面设计要求

### 配色方案
- 主色调：深海军蓝 #0F172A（导航栏、标题）
- 强调色：金黄 #FCD34D（CTA 按钮、重要数字、角标）
- 背景：纯白 #FFFFFF，卡片浅灰 #F8FAFC
- 状态色：绿色（生效中）、橙色（待续保）、红色（已失效）、蓝色（报价中）

### 主要页面布局
1. **仪表板**：4 个 KPI 卡片（活跃保单数、本月佣金、即将续保件数、待处理报价）+ 续保日历 + 最新活动列表
2. **报价向导**：步骤指示器（选险种 → 填资料 → 计算报价 → 确认）+ 实时保费预览
3. **保单列表**：可搜索表格 + 状态筛选 + 批量操作
4. **客户档案**：选项卡（基本资料 / 保单 / 报价 / 理赔 / 文件）
5. **佣金报告**：月份选择器 + 图表 + 明细表格

### 关键 UX 细节
- 报价计算实时响应，无需点击计算按钮
- 保单卡片显示「距到期 X 天」倒计时角标
- 所有金额以 RM 货币格式显示，保留两位小数
- 移动端友好，代理人可在现场用手机快速报价
- 表单所有必填项中文标签，符合本地用语习惯

---

## 五、安全与权限

- 所有表启用 RLS，代理人只能查看自己的客户和保单
- 使用 `(select auth.uid())` 模式避免每行调用的性能问题
- 敏感字段（IC 号码）在列表中脱敏显示（如 880101-**-****）
- 文件存储桶设置私有权限，通过签名 URL 访问

---

请从数据库 migration SQL 开始，然后依次生成所有页面和组件代码，确保每个模块功能完整可运行。
prompt_body_en:
You are an expert full-stack developer. Build a complete Insurance Quotation & Policy Management System for Malaysian insurance agents using Next.js 14 (App Router) + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui + Supabase.

## Agency Configuration

Agency Name: {{agency_name}}
Insurance Types Offered: {{insurance_types}}
Default Commission Rate: {{commission_rate}}%
Renewal Reminder Lead Time: {{renewal_reminder_days}} days before expiry

---

## 1. Role & Context

You are building a business productivity tool for a Malaysian insurance agent or small agency. The system replaces paper-based quoting and spreadsheet policy tracking. Key jobs-to-be-done: generate accurate premium quotes in under 2 minutes, track every policy's renewal date, record commission earnings, and log claims.

Malaysian-specific requirements: NCD (No Claims Discount) table for motor insurance, Malaysian Ringgit (RM) currency, local insurers (Allianz, AIA, Zurich, Etiqa, Takaful Malaysia), SST (Sales & Service Tax) at 8%, RM 10 stamp duty on motor policies.

---

## 2. Tech Stack

- Framework: Next.js 14 App Router, TypeScript strict mode
- Styling: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui (new-york style, light mode)
- Database & Auth: Supabase (PostgreSQL + RLS + Realtime)
- PDF Generation: @react-pdf/renderer for quotation and policy summary PDFs
- Scheduled Jobs: Supabase Edge Functions + pg_cron for renewal reminders
- File Storage: Supabase Storage (private bucket for client documents)
- Deployment: Vercel

---

## 3. Database Schema

Create all tables with full columns, constraints, foreign keys, and indexes. Enable Row Level Security on every table.

### clients
Fields: id (uuid pk), agent_id (uuid fk auth.users), full_name, ic_number (unique), date_of_birth, age (generated stored integer), gender, phone, email, address, occupation, smoker (bool), notes, created_at.
Indexes: agent_id, ic_number.

### vehicles
Fields: id, client_id (fk), plate_number, make, model, year, engine_cc, market_value (numeric), ncd_percentage (numeric default 0), created_at.
Index: client_id.

### quotations
Fields: id, agent_id, client_id (fk), vehicle_id (fk nullable), insurance_type (enum: motor/life/medical/fire/travel), sum_insured, details (jsonb), insurer_quotes (jsonb array of {insurer, basic_premium, ncd_discount, loading, stamp_duty, sst, total}), selected_insurer, selected_premium, status (enum: draft/sent/accepted/rejected/converted), valid_until, created_at.
Indexes: agent_id, client_id, status.

### policies
Fields: id, agent_id, client_id (fk), vehicle_id (fk nullable), quotation_id (fk nullable), policy_number (unique), insurance_type, insurer, sum_insured, basic_premium, ncd_discount, loading_amount, stamp_duty (default 10), sst_amount, total_premium, start_date, end_date, ncd_percentage, status (enum: quotation/application/active/renewal/lapsed/cancelled), documents (jsonb), created_at.
Indexes: agent_id, client_id, end_date, status.

### commission_records
Fields: id, agent_id, policy_id (fk), client_name, insurance_type, premium_amount, commission_rate, commission_amount, earned_date, payment_status (enum: pending/paid/cancelled), created_at.
Indexes: agent_id, earned_date.

### renewal_reminders
Fields: id, policy_id (fk), agent_id, reminder_date, days_before, channel (enum: email/whatsapp/sms default email), sent (bool default false), sent_at (timestamptz nullable), created_at.
Indexes: agent_id, reminder_date, sent.

### claim_records
Fields: id, policy_id (fk), client_id (fk), claim_number (unique), incident_date, claim_type, claim_amount, approved_amount (nullable), status (enum: submitted/under_review/approved/rejected/paid), description, documents (jsonb), created_at.
Index: policy_id.

RLS pattern for all tables: agents can only SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE their own rows where agent_id = (select auth.uid()). Use the subquery form to avoid per-row function evaluation overhead.

---

## 4. Core Features

### Feature A: Client Database
Full client profile form with all fields. Client search by name, IC number, or phone. Client detail page with tabs: Profile / Policies / Quotations / Claims / Documents. Document upload (IC copy, driving licence, vehicle grant) to private Supabase Storage bucket. IC number masked in list views (e.g. 880101-**-****).

### Feature B: Motor Insurance Quotation with NCD Calculator
Implement Malaysian NCD table:
- 0 years claim-free: 0% discount
- 1 year: 25%
- 2 years: 38.33%
- 3 years: 45%
- 4+ years: 55%

Premium calculation formula:
1. Basic Premium = derived from sum insured / market value and engine CC band
2. NCD Discount = Basic Premium x NCD%
3. Loading = age-based (under 21 or over 70: +25%), occupation loading, claims history loading
4. Stamp Duty = fixed RM 10
5. SST = (Basic Premium - NCD Discount + Loading) x 8%
6. Total Premium = Basic Premium - NCD Discount + Loading + Stamp Duty + SST

Display side-by-side comparison table for at least 3 insurers (Allianz, AIA, Zurich) with their respective premiums. Calculation updates in real time as user types.

### Feature C: Multi-Product Quotation Wizard
Step-indicator wizard (Select Type → Enter Details → View Quotes → Confirm) for all insurance types:
- Life Insurance: inputs age, gender, smoker status, sum insured, policy term, premium payment term
- Medical Insurance: inputs age, plan tier (Basic/Enhanced/Premier), add-on riders
- Fire Insurance: inputs property type, built-up area, location, reinstatement value
- Travel Insurance: inputs destination region, trip duration, number of travellers, coverage tier

### Feature D: Policy Lifecycle Management
Status pipeline: Quotation → Application → Active → Renewal → Lapsed. Policy list with search, filter by status/type/expiry range. Card view and table view toggle. One-click renewal duplication (pre-fills previous policy data into new quotation). Policy detail page with full coverage breakdown and linked documents.

### Feature E: Renewal Reminder System
Automatically create renewal_reminders records when a policy is set to active, scheduled for {{renewal_reminder_days}} days before end_date. Dashboard widget "Upcoming Renewals" sorted by days remaining with colour-coded badges (green > 30 days, amber 8-30 days, red ≤ 7 days). Overdue/lapsed policies flagged with red alert. Manual send of WhatsApp/email renewal notice from policy detail page using a pre-written template.

### Feature F: Commission Tracking
Auto-create commission_records on policy activation at {{commission_rate}}% of total_premium. Support per-type commission rate overrides (motor may differ from life). Monthly commission report: deals closed, total premium collected, gross commission, received vs pending. Commission calendar showing daily earnings. Export to CSV.

### Feature G: Claims Management
Record new claim linked to a policy. Track status through full lifecycle. Claims history affects NCD on renewal: if claim was paid, reset NCD to 0% on next renewal. Claims list per client and per policy.

### Feature H: PDF Document Generation
Using @react-pdf/renderer, generate:
1. Quotation PDF: agency header with logo, client details, coverage summary, multi-insurer premium comparison table, validity date, agent contact
2. Policy Summary PDF: policy number, insured details, coverage period, sum insured, premium breakdown, important contact numbers, claims procedure
3. Renewal Notice PDF: policy details, days to expiry, estimated renewal premium, call-to-action to contact agent

---

## 5. UI/UX Design

Colour palette: dark navy #0F172A navigation, white content area, yellow/gold #FCD34D accent for CTAs and KPI highlights, slate text #334155. Status colours: green (active), amber (renewal due), red (lapsed), blue (quotation).

Dashboard layout:
- Row of 4 KPI cards: Active Policies, This Month Commission (RM), Renewals Due in 30 Days, Pending Quotations
- Upcoming Renewals table (policy, client, type, expiry date, days left, action)
- Recent Activity feed

Quotation wizard: sticky side panel showing live premium preview that updates as inputs change. Insurer comparison displayed as card grid, not just a table, for visual scanning.

Policy list: searchable data table with column sorting. Each row has a badge for status and a "Days to Renewal" countdown chip. Bulk actions: export selected, send renewal reminders.

Client profile: avatar with initials, full contact card, tabbed sections. Policy cards under Policies tab show type icon, insurer logo placeholder, policy number, expiry date, and total premium.

Mobile responsive: agents use this on-site with clients. Quotation wizard must work well on a phone screen. Bottom navigation bar on mobile with icons for Dashboard, Clients, Quotation, Policies, Reports.

---

## 6. Malaysian Business Rules

- All monetary values displayed as RM X,XXX.XX with two decimal places
- IC number format: YYMMDD-SS-GGGG (validate with regex)
- NCD is per-vehicle, not per-driver — carry NCD from old policy to new insurer if switching
- SST 8% applies to the nett premium (after NCD, before stamp duty)
- Stamp duty RM 10 is fixed for motor; RM 10 for fire; not applicable to life/medical/travel
- Commission is calculated on gross premium (before SST and stamp duty) in most cases — confirm with agency preference
- Policy year runs 12 months from start date; display both start_date and end_date prominently

---

## 7. Dashboard Summary Requirements

The main dashboard must show at a glance:
1. Total active policies count and total sum insured under management
2. Policies expiring within 30 days (count + list)
3. This month's commission earned (RM) vs last month
4. Number of open claims and their total value
5. Top 5 clients by premium volume
6. Monthly premium collected chart (last 12 months bar chart)

---

## Delivery Order

Please generate in this order:
1. Supabase migration SQL (all tables, indexes, RLS policies, seed data with 5 sample clients and policies)
2. Next.js project structure and all route files
3. Supabase client utilities (lib/supabase/client.ts, server.ts, admin.ts)
4. All TypeScript types (types/index.ts)
5. Dashboard page
6. Client database pages (list + detail)
7. Quotation wizard with NCD calculator
8. Policy management pages
9. Commission report page
10. PDF generation utilities and download buttons
11. Renewal reminder Edge Function
12. All shadcn/ui components and layout

Ensure every module is fully functional and runnable. Include comments explaining Malaysian insurance business logic wherever calculation logic appears.

Show a quotation form on the left: Client Name 'Tan Wei Ming', IC Number, Age 35, Coverage Type (Motor/Life/Medical/Fire), Sum Insured RM 200,000, Vehicle details (for motor: Perodua Myvi 2022, NCD 55%). Right side shows generated quotation with premium breakdown: Basic Premium RM 1,200, NCD Discount -RM 660, Loading +RM 120, Stamp Duty RM 10, SST 8%, Total Premium RM 722.40. Show comparison of 3 insurance companies (Allianz, AIA, Zurich) with different premiums. Below show a policy list: Client, Policy No, Type, Sum Insured, Premium, Expiry Date, Days to Renewal, Status badge. Top nav with 'Insurance Manager'. Use dark nav + white content + yellow accents. Malaysian context: NCD, RM, local insurers.

title_zh: 药房库存与处方管理系统
subtitle: Build a complete pharmacy management system with drug inventory, prescription tracking, expiry alerts, and sales recording
boss_tip: Start with the drug inventory and expiry tracking — that's where pharmacies lose the most money. Add prescription recording and POS features after inventory management is solid.
prompt_body:
你是一位专业的全栈软件工程师，专门为马来西亚社区药房构建合规的管理系统。请按照以下规格，构建一套完整的药房库存与处方管理系统。

## 角色与背景

本系统专为马来西亚社区药房设计，必须符合以下法规要求：
- 马来西亚《1952年毒药法令》（Poisons Act 1952）及其修订版
- 卫生部（KKM）药房执照与记录保存要求
- 《1984年销售药品法令》（Sale of Drugs Act 1952）
- 《2006年药品广告与销售控制条例》

药房名称：{{pharmacy_name}}
药品类别：{{drug_categories}}
毒药分类：{{poison_categories}}
过期提醒天数：{{expiry_alert_days}}

## 技术栈

- **前端框架**：Next.js 14（App Router）+ TypeScript
- **样式方案**：Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui（new-york 风格，亮色模式）
- **数据库**：Supabase（PostgreSQL + Row Level Security）
- **认证**：Supabase Auth（药剂师登录）
- **部署**：Vercel
- **字体**：Inter + Noto Sans SC（通过 next/font 加载）
- **图标**：lucide-react

## 数据库结构

### 1. drugs（药品主档）
sql
CREATE TABLE drugs (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  name_zh VARCHAR(200),
  generic_name VARCHAR(200),
  brand VARCHAR(200),
  category VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (category IN ('prescription', 'otc', 'supplement', 'medical_device', 'traditional')),
  poison_group VARCHAR(10) CHECK (poison_group IN ('A', 'B', 'C', 'D', 'none')),
  dosage_form VARCHAR(100),
  strength VARCHAR(100),
  unit VARCHAR(50),
  barcode VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,
  reorder_level INTEGER DEFAULT 10,
  reorder_quantity INTEGER DEFAULT 50,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE INDEX idx_drugs_category ON drugs(category);
CREATE INDEX idx_drugs_poison_group ON drugs(poison_group);
CREATE INDEX idx_drugs_barcode ON drugs(barcode);
CREATE INDEX idx_drugs_name_search ON drugs USING GIN(to_tsvector('simple', name || ' ' || COALESCE(generic_name, '')));


### 2. suppliers（供应商）
sql
CREATE TABLE suppliers (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  contact_person VARCHAR(100),
  phone VARCHAR(20),
  email VARCHAR(100),
  address TEXT,
  license_number VARCHAR(100),
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);


### 3. drug_inventory（批次库存）
sql
CREATE TABLE drug_inventory (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  drug_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES drugs(id),
  batch_number VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  quantity INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  expiry_date DATE NOT NULL,
  cost_price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  selling_price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  supplier_id UUID REFERENCES suppliers(id),
  received_date DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
  purchase_order_number VARCHAR(100),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(drug_id, batch_number)
);
CREATE INDEX idx_inventory_drug_id ON drug_inventory(drug_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_inventory_expiry ON drug_inventory(expiry_date);
CREATE INDEX idx_inventory_supplier ON drug_inventory(supplier_id);


### 4. patients（患者档案）
sql
CREATE TABLE patients (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  full_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  ic_number VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  date_of_birth DATE,
  phone VARCHAR(20),
  email VARCHAR(100),
  address TEXT,
  allergies TEXT,

## 核心功能实现

### 功能一：药品数据库与毒药分类

药品表格包含完整的毒药分组信息：
- **A 组**：需要医生处方，配发后必须记录入毒药登记册
- **B 组**：药剂师监督销售，需要药剂师在场
- **C 组**：一般药品，可在药房自行购买
- **D 组**：危险药品，严格管控

在药品表单中，选择毒药组别时自动触发对应的业务规则验证。

### 功能二：FEFO 批次管理

typescript
// lib/fefo.ts
export async function selectBatchByFEFO(
  drugId: string,
  requiredQuantity: number,
  supabase: SupabaseClient
): Promise<BatchAllocation[]> {
  const { data: batches } = await supabase
    .from('drug_inventory')
    .select('*')
    .eq('drug_id', drugId)
    .gt('quantity', 0)
    .gt('expiry_date', new Date().toISOString())
    .order('expiry_date', { ascending: true });

  const allocations: BatchAllocation[] = [];
  let remaining = requiredQuantity;

  for (const batch of batches ?? []) {
    if (remaining <= 0) break;
    const take = Math.min(batch.quantity, remaining);
    allocations.push({ batchId: batch.id, batchNumber: batch.batch_number, quantity: take, expiryDate: batch.expiry_date });
    remaining -= take;
  }

  if (remaining > 0) throw new Error('库存不足');
  return allocations;
}


### 功能三：过期日期颜色编码

typescript
// components/inventory/expiry-badge.tsx
export function ExpiryBadge({ expiryDate }: { expiryDate: string }) {
  const days = differenceInDays(new Date(expiryDate), new Date());
  
  if (days < 0) return <Badge variant="destructive">已过期</Badge>;
  if (days < 30) return <Badge className="bg-red-500 text-white">{days}天后到期</Badge>;
  if (days < 90) return <Badge className="bg-yellow-400 text-slate-900">{days}天后到期</Badge>;
  return <Badge className="bg-green-100 text-green-800">{format(new Date(expiryDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd')}</Badge>;
}


### 功能四：处方录入系统

处方录入表单包含以下字段：
- 患者姓名、身份证号码（自动查找患者档案）
- 医生姓名、医生注册号码（MMC 编号）、诊所名称
- 处方日期
- 药品明细：选择药品、数量、剂量指示

### 功能五：POS 销售界面

收银台功能：

- 自动带入 FEFO 批次与价格
- 购物车管理（数量修改、删除）

### 功能六：低库存与过期提醒

仪表盘优先显示：

- **橙色警告**：{{expiry_alert_days}} 天内即将过期的批次
- **建议补货**：基于过去 30 天销量计算建议订购量

### 功能七：KKM 合规报表

月度报表功能：
- **毒药年度报告**（Yearly Poison Return）：A 组、B 组药品进出存汇总
- **受控药物月报**：每月第一周自动生成上月数据
- **库存盘点报表**：所有在库药品的批次、数量、价值汇总
- **过期药品报告**：待销毁药品清单

- 导出 CSV

## 业务规则

1. **A 组药品**：销售时必须选择关联处方，自动写入毒药登记册
2. **B 组药品**：系统提示「需要药剂师监督」，记录服务药剂师姓名
3. **过期药品**：库存中过期批次自动标红，禁止出售，触发销毁工作流
4. **FEFO 原则**：系统始终优先推荐最近过期的批次用于配发
5. **负库存保护**：销售时若某批次库存不足，系统拒绝并提示跨批次调配
6. **收据合规**：所有收据包含药房注册号、药剂师姓名及执照号

请生成以下完整文件：
1. 所有数据库迁移 SQL 文件（含 RLS 策略）
2. 完整的 Next.js 14 页面与组件代码
3. Supabase 服务端与客户端初始化文件
4. FEFO 批次分配工具函数
5. 类型定义文件（`types/pharmacy.ts`）
6. `.env.example` 配置说明

代码必须可直接运行，TypeScript 类型完整，无 `any` 类型。所有中文界面文字使用 Noto Sans SC 字体。

You are a professional full-stack software engineer specialising in building compliant management systems for Malaysian community pharmacies. Build a complete Pharmacy Inventory & Prescription Management System to the following specification.

## Role & Context

This system is designed for Malaysian community pharmacies and must comply with:
- Poisons Act 1952 (and amendments) — poison group classification and record-keeping
- Ministry of Health (KKM) pharmacy licensing and record requirements
- Sale of Drugs Act 1952
- Control of Drugs and Cosmetics Regulations 1984

Pharmacy name: {{pharmacy_name}}
Drug categories: {{drug_categories}}

│       └── sales-chart.tsx

│   └── reports.ts                  # KKM report generators
└── types/pharmacy.ts


## Core Feature Implementation

### Feature 1 — Drug Database & Poison Classification

The drug form must include a poison group selector (A / B / C / D / None). On selection:
- Group A: system shows warning "Prescription required — poison book entry will be created automatically"
- Group B: system shows "Pharmacist supervision required"
- Group C/D: standard flow

Poison group is stored on the `drugs` table and propagated to every sale and dispensing event.

### Feature 2 — FEFO Batch Management

Implement `lib/fefo.ts`:
typescript
export async function allocateBatchesFEFO(
  drugId: string,
  requiredQty: number,
  supabase: SupabaseClient
): Promise<BatchAllocation[]> {
  const { data: batches, error } = await supabase
    .from('drug_inventory')
    .select('id, batch_number, quantity, expiry_date')
    .eq('drug_id', drugId)
    .gt('quantity', 0)
    .gt('expiry_date', new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0])
    .order('expiry_date', { ascending: true });

  if (error) throw error;

  const allocations: BatchAllocation[] = [];
  let remaining = requiredQty;
  for (const batch of batches ?? []) {
    if (remaining <= 0) break;
    const take = Math.min(batch.quantity, remaining);
    allocations.push({ batchId: batch.id, batchNumber: batch.batch_number, quantity: take, expiryDate: batch.expiry_date });
    remaining -= take;
  }
  if (remaining > 0) throw new Error(`Insufficient stock: ${remaining} units short`);
  return allocations;
}


### Feature 3 — Expiry Colour Coding

Implement `components/inventory/expiry-badge.tsx` using `date-fns`:
- Expired (past): red destructive badge — "Expired"
- < 30 days: red badge — "X days left"
- 30–{{expiry_alert_days}} days: yellow/amber badge — "X days left"
- > {{expiry_alert_days}} days: green muted badge — formatted date

### Feature 4 — Prescription Entry

Rx form fields: Patient IC lookup (auto-fill name/DOB/allergies if exists), Doctor Name, MMC Registration Number, Clinic Name, Prescription Date, drug line items (drug search, quantity, dosage instructions). On save:
1. Create `prescriptions` record
2. Create `prescription_items` records
3. If any drug is Group A, auto-create `poison_book` entry

### Feature 5 — POS Terminal

Left panel: barcode scan input + drug search typeahead. Right panel: cart with quantity controls, FEFO batch auto-selected, subtotal per line. Bottom: payment method selector, total, print receipt button. Business rule: if cart contains Group A or B drug without a linked prescription, block checkout and prompt to attach Rx.

### Feature 6 — Low Stock & Expiry Alerts on Dashboard

Dashboard Server Component fetches in parallel via `Promise.all`:
- Total inventory value (SUM of qty * cost_price)
- Drugs below reorder_level
- Batches expiring within {{expiry_alert_days}} days
- Today's total sales (RM)

Display as four stat cards. Below: two tables — "Expiry Alerts" sorted by soonest expiry, "Low Stock" sorted by furthest below reorder level.

### Feature 7 — KKM Compliance Reports

Reports page generates:
1. **Monthly Poison Return** — Group A & B drugs: opening stock, purchases, sales, closing stock per drug
2. **Controlled Substance Dispensing Log** — all poison_book entries for selected month, printable as PDF via `window.print()`
3. **Stock Valuation Report** — all active batches with cost and retail value, grouped by category
4. **Expiry Disposal Report** — expired/near-expiry batches awaiting destruction sign-off

## Business Rules

1. Group A drugs: sale BLOCKED without linked prescription; poison_book entry auto-created on every dispensing
2. Group B drugs: checkout shows pharmacist confirmation dialog; pharmacist name recorded on sale
3. Expired batches: flagged read-only in inventory; cannot be added to cart; trigger disposal workflow
4. FEFO enforcement: system always pre-selects earliest-expiry batch; pharmacist can override with audit trail
5. Negative stock guard: if FEFO allocation cannot fulfil full quantity, throw error and show which batches are available
6. Receipt compliance: every receipt prints pharmacy name, registration number ({{pharmacy_name}}), pharmacist name and APC number, date/time, and GST/SST line if applicable

## UI / UX Specifications

### Colour Palette
- Nav background: `#0F172A` (dark navy)
- Content background: `#FFFFFF`
- Accent / primary CTA: `#FCD34D` (yellow-gold, used sparingly)
- Danger / low stock: `#EF4444`
- Warning / near-expiry: `#F59E0B`
- Success / healthy stock: `#10B981`
- Body text: `#1E293B` (slate-800)

### Layout
- Fixed left sidebar (240 px) with nav links: Dashboard, Inventory, Prescriptions, POS, Expiry, Poison Book, Reports, Suppliers, Settings
- Top header: pharmacy name, logged-in pharmacist, notifications bell (badge count = low stock + expiry alerts)
- Main content: full-width with 24 px padding

### Inventory Table
- Columns: Drug Name, Generic Name, Category, Poison Group (colour-coded chip), Total Stock, Reorder Level (red if below), Nearest Expiry (colour badge), Selling Price (RM), Actions
- Row expandable to show all batches with individual expiry dates
- Search by name/barcode, filter by category/poison group, sort by expiry
- Bulk export to CSV

## Deliverables

Generate all of the following with complete, runnable code:
1. All database migration SQL files with RLS policies and indexes
2. Complete Next.js 14 page and component files
3. Supabase client/server/admin initialisation in `lib/supabase/`
4. `lib/fefo.ts` with full TypeScript types
5. `types/pharmacy.ts` — all entity types, no `any`
6. `.env.example` with all required environment variables
7. `components/inventory/expiry-badge.tsx` with correct colour logic

All TypeScript must be strictly typed (no implicit `any`). All prices display in RM format (`RM 0.00`). All dates use Malaysian locale (`en-MY`). The system must be deployable to Vercel with zero configuration beyond environment variables.
